gcc -O3 CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/Core/Graphics/src/window.c.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/Core/Graphics/src/button.c.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/Core/Graphics/src/sprite.c.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/Core/Graphics/src/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/Examples/SDL2/button_test.c.o -o gameEngine  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image
